[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / sphere

# Method: sphere()

```ts
sphere(radius?): void;
```

Draw a sphere mesh primitive.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `radius?` | `number` | Sphere radius in grid cells (defaults to 50). |

## Returns

`void`
